cards.back: It splits a single input signal into four identical outputs

cards.front: What is the purpose of an 8:1 demultiplexer?
cards.back: It splits an 8-bit input signal into eight identical outputs

cards.front: What is the primary function of a 4:1 multiplexer?
cards.back: It combines four input signals into a single output signal
It combines eight input signals into a single output signal
